info.name: ELK MCP Project v2
info.description:
Postman collection for the ELK MCP Project v2. Targets the elk HTTP API (OpenAPI-style endpoints) for Elasticsearch search and ML anomaly detection. Use these endpoints to test the flows that back the API.

- Search: POST /{index}/_search
- Anomaly results: POST /_ml/anomaly_detectors/{job_id}/_results

Agent access is via MCP tools (searchLogs, getAnomalyResults) which invoke the same backend elk flows.

Base URL: http://localhost:8081

request.description:
OpenAPI-compliant endpoint that mirrors Elasticsearch search API.

**URL Pattern:** `POST /{index}/_search`

**Path Parameters:**
- `index`: The Elasticsearch index name to search (defaults to 'my-index')

**Request Body:** Standard Elasticsearch query DSL

**Example Response:**
```json
{
  "took": 5,
  "timed_out": false,
  "_shards": {...},
  "hits": {...}
}
```

item.name: Anomaly Detection
item.description: Endpoints for ML anomaly detection results

request.description:
OpenAPI-compliant endpoint that mirrors Elasticsearch ML API for anomaly detection results.

**URL Pattern:** `POST /_ml/anomaly_detectors/{job_id}/_results`

**Path Parameters:**
- `job_id`: The ML anomaly detection job ID

**Request Body Parameters:**
- `sort`: Field to sort results by
- `desc`: Sort order (true for descending)
- `start`: Start time for results
- `end`: End time for results  
- `anomaly_score_filter`: Filter for anomaly scores

**Example Response:**
```json
{
  "count": 2,
  "results": [...]
}
```

**Note:** This endpoint is also accessible via MCP tool `getAnomalyResults` for agent integration.

item.name: Health Check Examples
item.description: Example requests for testing basic connectivity

request.description:
Simple test request to verify the OpenAPI search endpoint is working.
Uses the default index 'my-index' with a match_all query limited to 1 result.

**Note:** Tool functionality now available via MCP `searchLogs` and `getAnomalyResults` tools for agent integration.
